---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the HarmonyOS music app reference project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Motivation

What learning, engineering, or user-flow problem would this improve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or documentation improvement.

## Alternatives Considered

List any simpler approaches or reasons this belongs in the project.

## Impact Scope

- [ ] Playback / AVPlayer
- [ ] AVSession / background media controls
- [ ] Lyrics / LRC parsing
- [ ] RDB / local data
- [ ] UI / layout
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Permissions / privacy
- [ ] Legal resource integration

## Runtime Environment

If relevant:

- DevEco Studio version:
- HarmonyOS SDK version:
- Device or emulator:

## Screenshots or Logs

Attach mockups, screenshots, or logs if they help explain the request.

## Copyright Resource Check

- [ ] This request does not require adding copyright-protected full audio, complete commercial lyrics, commercial cover art, or singer images.
- [ ] If the feature involves media resources, it can work with placeholders or legally licensed local assets.

## Permission or Privacy Check

- [ ] This request does not require new sensitive permissions.
- [ ] This request may require permission/privacy review and I described why above.

## Self-Check

- [ ] I searched existing issues first.
- [ ] I kept the request focused on open source learning or engineering reference value.
